title: centaurea × grafiana
intro: Centaurea × grafiana, also known as the Knapweed or Star Thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the aster family, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and coarse, hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea × grafiana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Centaurea × grafiana can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
